examples: Have you finished your report, Constable?
The old sexist positions are being challenged everyday by the female pilots flying fast jets to the female constable pounding the beat in your local town.
By-and-by the constable arrived at a deserted market-square, and proceeded to cross it.
Constable Stephen Carroll was murdered by dissident republican paramilitaries in County Armagh on 9 March 2009.
Constable Carroll, 48, was shot in the head in Craigavon after answering a 999 call.
